title: Barcelona Crosswind Final
subtitle: LEBL 25L · A330 · Strong left crosswind
description: You're established on a short final into Barcelona El Prat runway 25L in the Airbus A330. A stiff northerly wind puts a solid crosswind on the runway. Gear is down, flaps are set — plant it firmly and keep it straight. A greaser is not the goal.
difficultyBlurb: Easy evaluates core touchdown safety. Strict adds crab, rollout stability, and path quality.
hudTips: Strong crosswind from the LEFT — expect drift.
Plant firmly; a butter touchdown scores lower here.
Wings level before mains — protect the engine pods.
Stay on centerline through the rollout.
